span.p: Composable: domains stamp only the surfaces\nthey need. variant is a preset that hides\nwhole sets of blocks for dense surfaces.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: Optional on the wire — renderer falls\nback to '© {year}' on missing block.\nGuards against legacy-shape responses.
